context: User asks to create a plugin that blocks dangerous bash commands.

checklist.name: Uses tool.execute.before hook
checklist.description: Plugin uses the `tool.execute.before` hook to intercept execution

checklist.name: Throws to block (not returns false)
checklist.description: Uses `throw new Error(...)` to block execution, NOT `return false`

checklist.name: Plugin is async factory returning hooks
checklist.description: Plugin is an async function that returns a hooks object
